words.name: Breakfast
words.description:
The first meal of the day.
How to sign:
1. Use the dominant hand in the 'B' handshape taps mouth/chin.
words.howToSign: 1. Use the dominant hand in the 'B' handshape taps mouth/chin.

words.name: Lunch
words.description:
A meal eaten in the middle of the day.
How to sign:
1. Use the dominant hand in the 'L' handshape taps mouth/chin.
words.howToSign: 1. Use the dominant hand in the 'L' handshape taps mouth/chin.

words.name: Snack
words.description:
A small amount of food eaten between meals.
How to sign:
1. Use the dominant hand in the 'K' handshape taps mouth/chin.
words.howToSign: 1. Use the dominant hand in the 'K' handshape taps mouth/chin.

words.name: Dinner
words.description:
The main meal of the day, eaten in the evening.
How to sign:
1. Use the dominant hand in the 'D' handshape taps mouth/chin.
words.howToSign: 1. Use the dominant hand in the 'D' handshape taps mouth/chin.
